1.`32.*u])^2*Log[0.25`32.*(4.`32. - 1.`32.*u)])) + 201.5912183893737011894880212403222107013336729472615379800812`32.*((-12.5663706143591729538505735331180115367886775975004232838998`32.*(2.`32. - 1.`32.*Sqrt[4.`32. -
